speaker: speaker1
text: Good evening , sir . I come to make the bed . Shall I do it now or later ?

speaker: speaker2
text: Well , since you have come , do it now please ?

speaker: speaker1
text: That's all . Have a nice stay here .

speaker: speaker2
text: Thank you.Please get some soap for us .

speaker: speaker1
text: Just a moment . I will do it right now .
